text: Good evening. My name is Jacob. I'm calling because they're pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through South Carolina state relief program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? Yes, so I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
